mnemonics.title: MAIN Thread
mnemonics.content: M - Method execution starts here, A - Automatically created by JVM, I - Initial thread of a Java program, N - Normal priority is 5

mnemonics.title: Thread Lifecycle
mnemonics.content: CREATE, EXECUTE, TERMINATE - C.E.T. to remember the main thread's lifecycle

mnemonics.title: Thread Methods
mnemonics.content: SLEEP, SETNAME, SETPRIORITY, GETNAME, GETPRIORITY, GETID, ISALIVE - 'Six Super Students Set Good Goals In Sleep'
